assertions.title: Unified error handling

steps.action: Run baseline truth-lane tests: mvn --settings /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/.mvn/settings.xml -f /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/pom.xml test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 377, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

steps.action: Search module service classes for direct throws: pattern `throw new IllegalArgumentException(` and `throw new IllegalStateException(`
steps.observed: No direct `throw new IllegalArgumentException` / `throw new IllegalStateException` matches in module service classes

steps.action: Inspect shared validation/error paths (`ValidationUtils` + service usage grep)
steps.observed: `ValidationUtils.invalidInput`/`invalidState` return raw IllegalArgumentException/IllegalStateException, and these are used broadly in services (e.g., SalesService, PurchasingService, PayrollService, Accounting services)

terminalSnapshots: grep (service classes) for direct throw new IllegalArgumentException/IllegalStateException -> no direct matches
grep ValidationUtils.invalid(Input|State) across module services -> widespread usage

assertions.issues: Contract requires business validation errors to use structured ApplicationException/ErrorCode only. Current shared validation path throws raw IllegalArgumentException/IllegalStateException, so assertion does not satisfy contract semantics.

assertions.title: Shared idempotency framework

steps.action: Search for idempotency package declarations under core
steps.observed: Found shared core package: com.bigbrightpaints.erp.core.idempotency (IdempotencySignatureBuilder, IdempotencyUtils, IdempotencyReservationService)

steps.action: Search module service imports for shared idempotency classes
steps.observed: Shared imports present in accounting, sales, purchasing, inventory, factory, production, and company modules

steps.action: Search modules for local hash/normalization/idempotency logic
steps.observed: Local hashing/signature logic still present (e.g., PayrollService uses DigestUtils.sha256Hex for run signature; AccountingFacade has local normalizeDecimal + DigestUtils.sha256Hex; SalesOrderRequest and PackingController compute local hashes)

terminalSnapshots: grep package .*idempotency -> core/idempotency package files found
grep import com.bigbrightpaints.erp.core.idempotency.* in module services -> multiple module matches
grep DigestUtils.sha256Hex/normalizeDecimal in modules -> local implementations remain

assertions.issues: Shared framework exists and is used, but idempotency-related hashing/signature logic is still duplicated in module code paths; assertion requirement of no module-local copy-paste logic is not fully met.

assertions.title: Shared validation utilities

steps.observed: ValidationUtils contains requirePositive, parseEnum, validateDateRange, requireNotBlank, requireNotNull, requireEntity

steps.action: Search module code for usage of ValidationUtils.parseEnum / validateDateRange / requirePositive
steps.expected: These shared utilities are used across modules
steps.observed: No matches for ValidationUtils.parseEnum, ValidationUtils.validateDateRange, or ValidationUtils.requirePositive in module source

steps.action: Search module services for duplicated local validation helpers
steps.expected: No local duplicate helpers where shared utility should be used
steps.observed: Local requirePositive helpers remain in multiple services (AccountingService, RawMaterialService, SalesReturnService, InventoryAdjustmentService, OpeningStockImportService)

terminalSnapshots: Read ValidationUtils.java -> shared helper methods defined
grep ValidationUtils.parseEnum -> no matches in modules
grep ValidationUtils.validateDateRange -> no matches in modules
grep ValidationUtils.requirePositive -> no matches in modules
grep private .*requirePositive( in module services -> multiple local helper matches

assertions.issues: Shared utility exists but key common validation operations are not adopted broadly; duplicated per-service validation helpers indicate assertion criteria is not satisfied.

steps.action: Run baseline truth-lane from mission guidance
steps.expected: mvn test baseline completes with zero failures
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 377, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

steps.action: Run focused runtime coverage regression subset
steps.expected: Runtime coverage tests pass including previously problematic paths
steps.observed: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 7, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0 (TS_RuntimeGlobalExceptionHandlerExecutableCoverageTest and TS_RuntimePayrollServiceGuardrailsTest included)

terminalSnapshots: mvn ... test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true -> Tests run: 377, Failures: 0, Errors: 0
mvn ... test -Djacoco.skip=true -Dtest=TS_RuntimeGlobalExceptionHandlerExecutableCoverageTest,TS_RuntimePayrollServiceGuardrailsTest -> Tests run: 7, Failures: 0, Errors: 0

frictions.description: Initial baseline test invocation failed because Maven settings path was resolved relative to current working directory (`.mvn/settings.xml` not found) when using `-f` from outside module dir.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran commands with explicit settings file: --settings /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/erp-domain/.mvn/settings.xml

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-FOUND-004), 3 failed (VAL-FOUND-001/002/003). Baseline gate-fast suite passed with 377/377, but infrastructure contracts for unified error handling, full idempotency centralization, and shared validation utility adoption are not fully satisfied by current code evidence.
